title: Incident Detail Page: Redesign + SSE + Live Audit Trail

sprints.title: SSE Hook + Bug Fixes
sprints.notes: Created use-incident-stream hook (incidentId-filtered SSE consumer for /api/notifications/stream, manual reconnect, graceful EventSource missing fallback). Created DisconnectedBanner. Refactored incident-detail.tsx: removed setInterval/POLL_INTERVAL_MS/IN_PROGRESS_STATUSES, wired stream.on for incident.status_changed/incident.updated/investigation.completed/.failed/.aborted/remediation.proposed re-fetch. Fixed incident-feedback.tsx and remediations-section.tsx: replaced if(!res.ok)return early-returns with explicit setError + UI error branch + Retry button; removed literal 'Loading...' (skeleton divs instead). Inverted polling.test.ts to assert polling is gone. Added i18n keys: detail.liveProgress, detail.stream.{connecting,disconnected,error,reconnect,devUnavailable}, detail.feedback.{errorState,retry}, detail.remediations.{errorState,retry,investigationPending,completedEmpty,completedEmptyWithCause,loading} in en + pt-br. 32 new tests across 8 files (incident-stream-types, use-incident-stream, disconnected-banner, incident-detail, incident-feedback, remediations-section, polling regression). All 69 investigation tests pass. RemediationsSection contract extended with optional incidentStatus + rootCause props (Sprint 4 will wire branching).

sprints.title: Audit BFF Passthrough + Action Registry
sprints.notes: Extended VALID_ACTIONS with 7 new agent/investigation actions (investigation.{started,completed,aborted,failed}, agent.{started,evidence_appended,completed}). Added ALLOWED_AUDIT_RESOURCE_TYPES = ['incident','remediation','approval'] const. Extended ListAuditParams with optional resourceType + resourceId. Updated http-api-client.listAuditEntries to forward both. Updated audit-handler.ts to parse resourceType/resourceId, validate resourceType against allowlist (returns 400 with descriptive error), forward both to client.listAuditEntries. Backwards compatible: existing action filter + pagination unchanged when new params absent. 19 new tests across 2 files (12 audit-handler + 7 audit/types). All audit + investigation tests green.

sprints.title: Live Activity Timeline Component
sprints.notes: Created incident-detail/lib/agent-role-meta.ts (Record<AgentRole, {icon, colorClasses, labelKey}> with distinct icons/colors per role), agent-step-mappers.ts (pure mapAuditEntryToAgentStep + mapSseEventToAgentStep, parses agent.<role>.<verb> format, handles audit.appended SSE events with action passthrough or thin generic fallback, derives status from verb), agent-step-card.tsx (renders icon + label + relative time + summary, falls back to system Activity icon when agentRole=null), live-activity-timeline.tsx (fetches /api/audit?resourceType=incident&resourceId=&limit=50 on mount via Sprint 2 BFF, dedups by step.id with seenIdsRef Set, sorts createdAt DESC defensively per PRD Q4, subscribes to audit.appended/agent.*/investigation.* SSE events, four states loading/error/empty/populated with aria-live=polite). Added i18n: detail.liveActivity.{title,empty,history,errorState,retry} and detail.agents.{log_analyst,metric_analyst,infra_inspector,orchestrator,scout,diagnosis_verifier} in en + pt-br. 38 new tests across 6 files (16 mappers + 4 role-meta + 5 card + 8 timeline + 5 sources for sprint files). All 130 investigation+audit tests green.

sprints.title: Remediations + Feedback Four-State UX
sprints.notes: Created RemediationsEmptyState (3 states: pending/completed-empty/error with rootCause inline copy support via completedEmptyWithCause i18n key, Retry button only on error+onRetry) and FeedbackEmptyState (empty/error states). Modified remediations-section.tsx to use RemediationsEmptyState: defines IN_PROGRESS_INCIDENT_STATUSES = open|triaging|investigating|awaiting_approval|remediating, branches based on incidentStatus (defaults to safer pending state when undefined). Modified incident-feedback.tsx to use FeedbackEmptyState. The 'noRemediations' i18n key is preserved (other consumers may still use it). 9 new tests across 2 files (5 remediations-empty-state + 4 feedback-empty-state). All 130 investigation+audit tests still pass.

sprints.title: Layout Redesign + Integration
sprints.notes: Created IncidentActionBar (pure presentational, all handlers via props), IncidentNarrative (Description/RootCause/Resolution/AssignedAgents/Timestamps with conditional empty section omission), IncidentStatusPanel (lg:sticky lg:top-4, connection-state pill, accepts actionBar as ReactNode prop). Refactored incident-detail.tsx into 2-column responsive grid (lg:col-span-8 narrative + lg:col-span-4 status panel/timeline) with Back link, DisconnectedBanner, live progress indicator, KnownSolutionBanner, mobile-first stacking via grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12. Created use-incident-actions hook to extract POST handlers (handleRerun/handleStartTriage/handleStartInvestigation/handleAbortInvestigation/handleKnownSolutionResponse) and per-action loading state — this reduced incident-detail.tsx from 442 to 180 lines (well under PRD's 250 budget). Added 4 i18n actions keys (abortConfirm/abortYes/abortCancel/creating) + stream.connected. Updated apps/dashboard/CLAUDE.md investigation context entry with the new incident-detail/ sub-folder + hooks/ files. 19 new tests across 5 files (5 action-bar + 3 narrative + 5 status-panel + 1 use-incident-actions smoke + tests for Sprint 5 layout invariants). All 144 investigation+audit tests green. All 7 INVARIANTS.md verify commands pass (polling forbidden, Loading literal banned in production source, agent roles cardinality=6, SSE proxy generic, BFF audit allowlist, no barrel imports, tenant+incident isolation in hook). Pre-existing dashboard lint warnings (noExplicitAny in http-api-client submitRemediationFeedback, noImplicitAnyLet in remediations-id-handler) and one TS error in services.test.ts (unrelated TenantPlan 'free') were NOT introduced by this PRD.
